ai_summary: This document confirms that Globe International Carriers Limited (GICL) has complied with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India, verified that all securities received for dematerialization were processed, confirmed, and cancelled with depositories updated within the prescribed timelines. This is a routine compliance filing indicating sound corporate governance regarding share registry management, with no material impacts or red flags identified.
